title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, a regulated financial exchange for real-world events, was founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara and spent four years fighting regulatory obstacles before reaching a $22 billion valuation. The founders sued a government regulator to break through legal barriers and achieved rapid scaling to millions of customers and billions in trading volume within weeks.
